title: Sharon Bains
content:
Chief Financial Officer
People.ContactEmail sbains@mccarthy.ca
As Chief Financial Officer, Sharon is responsible for the firm’s financial management, overseeing financial operations, including budgeting, billing and collections, audits, reporting and analytics, and long-term financial planning to ensure the firm’s fiscal health and sustainability.
Sharon is a Finance and Operations professional with over 20 years of experience in a professional services firm, advising senior leadership on finance and business objectives. Her career includes a progression of roles at Accenture, leading to her role as Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer of Canada, where she played a key leadership role in supporting the firm’s local growth while maintaining financial discipline.
Sharon is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA), and holds a Bachelor of Business Administration from Wilfrid Laurier University.
